note: Public ship log. Curated from WORK-LOG.md + git commits + tenant deploys. Updated when meaningful things ship.

entries.summary: Shipped /voice-check — paste any copy, get banned-word flagging + voice score. Runs client-side.
Shipped /calculator — interactive scope calculator with 14 feature toggles, real price + launch date.
Shipped /capabilities — full scope of what I build, what I bring, what I don't do, procurement-ready.
Site-wide voice pass: 'we/our' → 'I/my', 'scope call' → 'intro call'. 14 files cleaned.
3 new live case-study tiles on homepage: Splash Jacks Pools, Casamoré, Buildbridge.
Shipped docs/VOICE.md — canonical voice doc with banned-word list and signature moves.
Mobile dial-back: CmdKPalette + StatusLine hidden on mobile per persona audit.
Hero rebuild: ProfessionalHero — plain-English headline, no jargon, no typing gate.
Pricing: added Spark tier ($1.5k local sites) + ops ladder $49/$149/$299.
Strategic pivot: Day14 = build studio running on Day14 OS. New headline, per-build pricing, intro-call CTA.
Migrations 0011-0013 prepared: credentialing packet, dossier auto-gen, facility job management.
Generated 8 cinematic landing images via Gemini, 9.5 MB total.
Manifesto + one-pager published. Day14 OS waitlist opened (paused 6 days later, replaced by build-studio pitch).
Phase 7 shipped: full clinician onboarding flow live on production.
Scheduled-task cadence stabilized: nightly polish, weekly UX audit, monthly analytics.
Customer-success state file bootstrapped. Daily heartbeat polling.
Storm Mode shipped: NOAA RSS → contractor mobilization 4-channel fan-out.
Photo-proof pipeline live: sharp + EXIF + GPS + timestamp watermarking on every visit.
